props.text: Step-by-step guide to installing CLASP and deploying Google Workspace Add-ons from a shared git repository using a dedicated deployment account. Tick each step as you complete it.

items.description: The shared deployment Google account — not your personal account
Clone/pull permissions on the add-on repository
With Apps Script API enabled and OAuth consent screen configured

props.label: Install nvs (Node Version Switcher)
props.command: export NVS_HOME="$HOME/.nvs" && git clone https://github.com/jasongin/nvs "$NVS_HOME" && . "$NVS_HOME/nvs.sh" install
props.hint: Skip if nvs is already installed — verify with: nvs --version

props.label: Set Node version to LTS
props.command: nvs add lts && nvs use lts
props.hint: Verify with: node --version (expect v18 or higher)

props.text: GCP setup must be done before first deploy. These are one-time steps per project.

items.description: GCP Console → APIs & Services → Enable Apps Script API
APIs & Services → OAuth consent screen → set app name, support email, scopes
OAuth consent screen → Test users → add the dedicated account email
Apps Script editor → Project Settings → Google Cloud Platform Project → enter GCP project number
Create or confirm the shared drive where the script project lives — dedicated account must have Contributor access

props.label: Pull latest code from repository
props.hint: First time? Use: git clone <repo-url> && cd <repo-folder>

props.text: Login with the dedicated deployment account — not your personal Google account. A browser window will open for OAuth.

props.label: Authenticate CLASP with dedicated account
props.hint: To check who is logged in: clasp login --status

items.description: Run clasp create first to link this folder to a new Apps Script project on the shared drive
Confirm .clasp.json contains the correct scriptId before pushing — no clasp create needed
Same flow, but run from a scheduled job using the dedicated account credentials; scriptId in .clasp.json must match the production deployment

props.label: Push files to Apps Script
props.hint: –force overwrites remote without prompting. Check .claspignore to confirm only intended files are pushed.

props.label: Create a new versioned deployment
props.hint: Note the deployment ID in the output — needed for update deploys and Workspace admin install

items.description: clasp deployments  — copy the target deployment ID
Apps Script enforces a 20-version limit per project. Run clasp undeploy <oldest-id> before deploying when at the limit.

props.text: Share the deployment URL with the Workspace admin for installation, or install directly via Google Workspace Marketplace if published. For internal tools, the admin installs via Admin Console → Apps → Google Workspace Marketplace apps → install by URL.
